embed.title: !invasion
embed.description: Alias for `{{prefix}}incident`. Both commands do the same thing, but `{{prefix}}incident` is preferred because it covers more than just Team Rocket grunts — Kecleon, Pokemon Showcases, and gold pokestops all come through the same webhook.

fields.name: See the full help
fields.value: Type `{{prefix}}help incident` for the complete list of grunt types, leaders, and other incident kinds you can track.

fields.name: Quick examples
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}invasion dragon` — dragon-type grunts
`{{prefix}}invasion kecleon` — Kecleon appearances
`{{prefix}}invasion giovanni` — Giovanni incidents
`{{prefix}}invasion remove everything`
